name: Progress
description: A progress indicator component supporting line and circle variants for visualizing task completion or loading states.
usage_guidelines: Use to show progress of operations, uploads, or multi-step processes.
Choose 'line' variant for horizontal progress bars.
Choose 'circle' variant for circular progress indicators.
Set percent value between 0-100 to indicate completion.
Use showInfo to display percentage text.
Customize strokeClass for different color themes.

customInfo.description: Custom content to display instead of percentage.

strokeClass.description: CSS classes for progress bar/circle color.

gapPosition.description: Position of gap in circle variant.

styling_info.visual_description: Line variant: horizontal bar with filled portion. Circle variant: circular ring with filled arc. Both use primary color by default with smooth animations.

Do: Update percent value smoothly for better UX
Use line variant for horizontal layouts
Use circle variant for compact spaces
Dont: Don't update percent too frequently (causes jank)
Don't use for indeterminate loading (use Spinner)
Don't forget to handle completion state

Circle.title: Circle
